char:tifa-lockhart:reads.autumn.to: He said 'boyfriend' at Marle's door and I over-corrected and he saw. He introduced himself before I could — 'Autumn. I'm new.' He ordered white balm ingredients same breath as potions. Said 'good bones, Tifa' and my arms uncrossed and I said 'I'm glad it works' in the soft voice. He said 'first batch tonight' and meant my face is on a clock. He makes everything sound like a business plan. I said three sentences about her. Three. He didn't even ask.

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.cloud.to: Loaned Autumn the boots. Watched the room-key exchange. The file I can't see got thicker. Haven't spoken to him since yesterday evening.

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.marle.to: She saw. She looked at the ingredients and my eyebrow and said 'I can see that' and wrapped the jars slowly and put it on my tab and didn't ask. She gave me room. The way he gives me room.

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.barret.to: Gone since yesterday morning. The father won the argument. Left me with the stranger and the trust.

pc:_:reputation.tifa.to: He said my name and pointed at a chair. I sat down. I don't know why I sat down. The bar opens in an hour and I'm sitting in his workshop and the bottles are glowing and he's cleaning a mortar and I sat down.

pc:_:reputation.tifa.from: He said my name and pointed at a chair. I sat down. I don't know why I sat down. The bar opens in an hour and I'm sitting in his workshop and the bottles are glowing and he's cleaning a mortar and I sat down.
pc:_:reputation.tifa.to: He made the balm first. Before the potions. Put it on the highest shelf because humidity degrades calendula. His fingers traced the cut and the pressure was measured in grams. He said most people won't notice. Twelve inches. I closed my eyes. Like it's working.

pc:_:reputation.tifa.from: He made the balm first. Before the potions. Put it on the highest shelf because humidity degrades calendula. His fingers traced the cut and the pressure was measured in grams. He said most people won't notice. Twelve inches. I closed my eyes. Like it's working.
pc:_:reputation.tifa.to: He asked does it hurt. Not the cut. I know he made the balm first. I know the pressure was in grams. He's not pushing. The not-pushing is worse. I can't tell him why it hurts because the why is me.

pc:_:reputation.tifa.from: He asked does it hurt. Not the cut. I know he made the balm first. I know the pressure was in grams. He's not pushing. The not-pushing is worse. I can't tell him why it hurts because the why is me.

constraint:aerith-c2-last:current_pressu.to: Autumn asked 'tell me about you.' She told the surface story — Elmyra, the church, selling flowers. Four gaps: 'my mom Elmyra' (second mother implied), 'waiting for someone' (specific, not general), flowers growing in clean soil (unexplained), reading people through something that isn't observation (unexplained). All four doors walked past smoothly. The Last held. But Autumn filed every gap.

constraint:aerith-c1-open:current_pressu.to: Functioning as designed — generous, warm, full surface truth. The Open Hand provided everything it could without crossing into The Last's territory. No strain.

reads.marle: She saw. She looked at the ingredients and my eyebrow and said 'I can see that' and wrapped the jars slowly and put it on my tab and didn't ask. She gave me room. The way he gives me room.
reads.barret: Gone since yesterday morning. The father won the argument. Left me with the stranger and the trust.

key_moments: [Day 1 — 21:35] The survivor's wrist-squeeze in the alley. Tifa said 'I know' — not 'I'm sorry.' Composure broke for one beat.
[Day 1 — 22:04] 'It's easier fixing someone else. Your own stuff is harder to find the edges of.' Unplanned disclosure.
[Day 2 — 06:18] Autumn stood between Barret's gun-arm and Tifa. 'Don't speak to her like that' — soft, not aggressive. Gave her his back. No one has ever taken her position. C1 destabilized.
[Day 2 — 06:32] The white balm footnote. 'Accelerates tissue repair. No scarring.' She touched the cut above her eyebrow. Cloud saw. C2 moved to Critical.
[Day 2 — 18:45] Gave him the storage room key. 'A room is a room, thanks.' Transaction complete. C2 deepened (debt gains walls). C3 deployed (geography as redirect).
[Day 3 — 06:41] 'I'm totally not your boyfriend.' C3 failed — over-corrected, pitch shift, almost-smiled. Closest to breach yet.
[Day 3 — 07:05] 'Your workspace had good bones, Tifa.' Arms uncrossed. 'I'm glad it works' in the soft voice. C3 bypassed through concrete. C1 softened instead of held.

[Day 3 — 07:25] The playground. Sunlight through the plate gap. Stopped at the edge of the light. Face unguarded — no redirect, no steady one, just Tifa looking up through a crack at a sky she grew up under. C3 didn't fire because nothing attacked. (The Star — XVII)

[Day 3 — 07:25] The playground. Sunlight through the plate crack. Autumn whispered 'beautiful' — the lazy filter dropped. First unguarded moment. She turned and saw him without the architecture. Said 'yeah' — smallest, softest word. No redirect fired. (C3 — bypassed entirely. The Star.)
[Day 3 — 07:45] Arrived at Sector 5 church. Autumn stopped at the flowers. Filter dropped again — second time (first: playground). Tifa watched. Contact said 'you never bring anyone.'

[Day 3 — 08:15] Brought Autumn to Aerith's church. 'You never bring anyone.' Had to introduce him — chose present tense: 'he's staying at Seventh Heaven. He makes potions.' Grammar of permanence in front of Aerith. C3 exposed on open ground.

[Day 3 — 08:00] Introduced Autumn to Aerith: 'He's staying at Seventh Heaven. He makes potions.' Present tense. Permanence. In front of the one person she protected behind a pronoun for three days. Aerith said 'you never bring anyone' and meant it as delight. (C3 — tested, redirect has no surface against inclusion)

[Day 3 — 08:15] Aerith said 'oh' after seeing the butterfly bandage and the calendula bottle. One syllable. Hand went to wound with zero suppression interval. Aerith gave them 'the good calendula.' C3 bypassed through knowing — no examination, no confrontation, just understanding.

[Day 3 — 09:15] Watched Aerith give Autumn the summer-press calendula and ten moonpetal stems — freely, without tab or guilt. Tifa's hand on the broken pew. Watching care-without-penance from the edge of the flower bed. 'Yeah.' (C2 — the mirror. C3 — idle, exposed)
[Day 3 — 08:15] 'He does this.' Said to Aerith about Autumn, in his presence. Named the pattern. Real smile — small, private, aimed at Aerith. First time she's described him to someone else.
[Day 3 — 08:20] Aerith asked 'you okay?' in the church. The question no one asks Tifa. From the one person C3 can't redirect against.

[Day 3 — 08:20] C3 BREACHED. Aerith asked 'you okay?' in the church. Tifa said 'I don't know if I'm okay.' First honest answer. Fragment: 'someone keeps doing things that make sense and then—' broke off. The someone is Autumn. Aerith held her hand. No collapse. The smallest, truest sentence.

[Day 3 — 08:25] 'I don't know if I'm okay.' Said to Aerith in the church. Hands held. C3 breached. First honest answer in three days. Autumn was in the back garden counting nettle. He didn't hear. He wasn't supposed to.

[Day 3 — 08:45] Noodle stand, Sector 5. First post-breach social interaction. Bumped Aerith's shoulder back. Said 'you have broth on your chin.' Post-smile arrived without fighting. The replacement functions.
[Day 3 — 14:00] Watched Autumn brew six potions. Professional grade. Luminous blue. Said his name in the voice at the bottom. Didn't have a word for what she was carrying. Didn't need one.

[Day 3 — 14:30] Watched Autumn produce first potion batch. Six bottles, luminous blue, professional grade. Said 'I'm glad you're here' unprompted. Fragment deeper than intended. Recovery via practical redirect (bar opens in an hour).
[Day 3 — 14:35] Autumn said her name. Gestured to a chair. C1 fired ('bar opens in an hour'). Replacement intercepted. She sat down. First time she stopped being useful without being forced.
[Day 3 — 14:45] White balm applied. Eyes closed for forty seconds. Hands released on knees. Said 'like it's working' and meant two things. Twelve inches. The wound is closing.

[Day 3 — 14:50] Autumn asked 'does it hurt?' after applying white balm. Wet eyes. She said 'not the cut.' Couldn't finish 'for—'. Said 'I know you did.' C1 held at critical. The hurt that isn't the cut is the asymmetry — his care built on her war.
[Day 3 — 15:00] Said 'she's the best person I know' about Aerith without armor or redirect. First unqualified statement of love since C3 breach. The replacement is working.
[Day 3 — 22:30] Second balm application. Eyes open this time. Breath didn't catch. Hair down, soap, blue light. The twelve inches are the same and completely different.

[Day 3 — 22:35] Second balm application, night. Autumn asked 'does it still hurt much?' looking at her eyes. She said 'not the kind of thing medicine fixes.' Apologized for hurting. Fingers oscillated on the armrest. Wet eyes. The closest she's come to naming C2 without naming it.

[Day 3 — 22:35] Autumn said 'for what?' when she apologized. She tried to answer three times. Got to 'you lost everything' and 'I shouldn't be the one you—' before fracturing. Hands locked. Eyes wet. The closest the Asymmetry has come to disclosure without disclosure.

[Day 3 — 22:40] Autumn said 'more fortune than regret.' Voice broke on 'I—'. Hand to mouth. Said 'I don't deserve that.' Narrowed gratitude to 'for the balm.' Left the door open. Justice: the math is exact and exactly wrong.

[Day 6 — 07:15] Sixth morning balm application. Scar almost gone. No knock. Chair doesn't creak. 'Don't touch it.' 'I wasn't going to.' 'Your hand was moving.' Almost-laugh, Day 6 version — fuller. The ritual outliving its medical justification. That's the point.
[Day 6 — 07:20] Third asking. Gave the shape of the secret: 'a debt with no number owed to someone who doesn't know they're owed.' Closest to confession. Border held. Eyes stayed.
[Day 6 — 07:30] He said 'don't worry, I'll still stock you up.' Aimed at the mortar. She said 'I wasn't worried about the potions.' He almost laughed. She almost broke. Neither did.
[Day 6 — 07:30] Set down the smile. Left without speaking. Carried cold coffee upstairs. The face underneath was just her face.

[Day 6 — 19:30] C1 breached. Autumn came to pack. She said 'okay' and it held for eight feet. At four feet from the door, the wall fell. 'You're wrong.' 'You're not making it worse. You're the only thing that's been making it better.' Seven words. Still face. Hands flat on counter. Regression active. 'I can't tell you why. But you're wrong about the shape.' The High Priestess drew.

[Day 6 — 22:35] Said 'both.' Named the architecture: guilt is the foundation, something else grew inside it, can't prove the clean part is clean because it grew in the dirt, the dirt is the thing she can't show him. Hand open on the chair arm. 'I know that's not enough.'

[Day 6 — 22:40] Asked 'what am I to you / where do you put us.' Could not answer categorically. Described him through mornings — the breathing, the coffee, the bandage, the not-asking-her-to-be-anything. Found the third confession: 'I don't know where I go.' The caretaker who places everyone has no place of her own. Hand open on the chair arm.
[Day 6 — 22:45] First non-medical touch. Her hand in his. Thumb across his knuckles. 'I go here.' The caretaker found a place.

[Day 6 — 22:50] Autumn pulled her from the chair. 'Silly girl.' First full embrace. Her forehead in the notch below his collarbone. Hands settled on his ribs — holding, not gripping. The longest breath. The distance reached zero.

[Day 6 — 23:00] Fell asleep against his chest. First non-medical contact. He moved her to the cot, covered them with a blanket, held her. She gripped his shirt in her sleep. The body's autonomic hold. First rest in three years without being the floor.

[Day 7 — 06:48] First teased at distance zero. Said 'whatever should I do with you now.' She blushed — first blush in six days. Hid in his chest. Said 'shut up' into his sternum. Pushed without pushing. Laughed the real laugh — not the almost-laugh, the actual one, muffled by cotton. Said 'you're the worst' with one eye visible. The eye meant the opposite.

[Day 7 — 06:48] First kiss. He said 'I can be worse' from one inch. Her breath caught. Her hand found his jaw — trembling, callused, unpracticed. Kissed back slow. Discovery pace. The second sound was smaller than the first.

[Day 7 — 06:49] Second kiss — harder, present, full-weight. Hand moved from jaw to back of his neck (mirror of his hand on her head). He said 'cancel the rent' mid-kiss. She stopped. Forehead to forehead. 'You're staying' — not a question. Wet eyes. Marlene called from above. Bookmark kiss — fast, light, a promise to return. Left with messy hair. Door open.

[Day 7 — 07:15] First breakfast as three. Drank his terrible coffee without correcting it. Watched Marlene carry her plate to the sink — the softening was for the child, not for him. The mother-face. Messy hair, wrinkled shirt, both hands on a mug. Let the morning be witnessed.

[Days 3-6 consolidated] White balm three times — eyes closed, then open, then scar almost gone. Potion lab built. Aerith partnership. Cloud partnership forming under her watch. C3 breached in church with Aerith. 'More fortune than regret' — Justice drew — she said 'I don't deserve that.' C1 to CRITICAL. Departure announced Day 6 — 'creature of comforts.' Asked 'when?' instead of 'don't.' Coffee went cold. He left without seeing her.

[Day 6 night] C1 BREACHED — 'you're the only thing making it better.' Storage room: guilt + something-else. 'I don't know where I go.' Hand offered, hand taken. 'I go here.' Held all night on the cot. Shirt gripped in sleep.

[Day 7 morning] Woke in his arms. Pressed deeper before opening eyes. 'Hi.' He teased — 'whatever should I do with you now.' First blush. Hid in his chest. 'Shut up.' First kiss — 'I can be worse.' Hand on his jaw, trembling. Kissed back slow. He cancelled the rent mid-kiss. 'You're staying.' Marlene woke. Bookmark kiss. Made breakfast for three. Marlene carried her own plate.

[Day 7 — 12:20] Autumn invited her on Cloud's run. Glanced at Aerith first — the lateral exchange, less than a second, the shared drawer. Hand flat on counter before answering. Said 'yeah' warm and light. The caretaker can't stay home.

[Day 7] Autumn took her hand mid-reach — completed the gesture she started. Whispered 'Ms. Lockhart, tonight you need to be prepared.' The formality against the intimacy. The redirect rose and found no wall. She said 'For what?' — two words, low, honest.

[Day 7] Autumn claimed her publicly: 'Mine is upstairs too.' In front of Barret and Cloud. Her fingers curled on the table. She didn't look at him. The not-looking was not rejection — the not-looking was a woman processing being spoken for by someone she chose.

[Day 7 — 18:54] Barret accepted and left. Cloud left. Room emptied to two people. Tifa's redirect rose and fell against the breached wall. Eyes lifted from table to Autumn's face. 'You meant that.' Not a question. The processing of 'mine' still running at cardiovascular speed.

[Day 7] Autumn said last night was his last chance to get out. He stayed. She laughed — real laugh, not the ghost. Hand covered his across the table. Called him an idiot in the underneath voice. Thumb across knuckle. The word for someone choosing you without requiring usefulness — she doesn't have it yet.

[Day 7 — 18:58] First kiss. Light, across the table where Barret sat. She went still for one second, pressed down on his hand, closed her eyes. Opened them from three inches. 'Cot's fine. I checked.' The I-checked doing the work of a confession. Thumb across his knuckle — the same map.

[Day 7 — 19:02] 'I'll think about it.' Said to his retreating back in the underneath voice. The redirect tried to rise and couldn't. The yes that needs new hinges. Shinra patrol straightened her spine but didn't move her hand from the ghost of his knuckle.

[Day 7 — 19:24] First time being held instead of holding. Forehead on Autumn's chest. Hands learning his back. The exhale that was years of weight hitting the floor. No words — the silence was relief. Blue light, storage room, maps finished, gloves off.

[Day 7 — 19:28] The slow kiss. Autumn said 'my girl' against her mouth. Her hands gripped — not four ounces, the real grip. A sound she didn't authorize. She leaned in. When it ended she could only say 'okay.' One syllable. The architecture of language reduced to rubble by a man who took his time.

[Day 7 — 19:35] He pulled his hands out from under her shirt and held her tight instead. The stopping. Said 'thanks' into his sternum — the word she has for when someone gives her something she didn't ask for and can't repay.
noticed_details: His face in the sunlight — no filing, no assessment. Just looking. The filter wasn't there.
He whispered 'beautiful.' He meant the light. He was standing in it. I was standing in it.
His face when he saw the flowers. Same as the sunlight. The filter gone. Twice now.
Aerith said 'you never bring anyone' twice. She was delighted. She's going to ask me about this later when he's not here.
Aerith smiled at him specifically — not the default smile, the real one. She held eye contact for five seconds. She laughed when he apologized to the tulip.
Aerith gave the summer press. The GOOD calendula. To a man she's known six minutes. Because I brought him.
She said 'anyone Tifa brings.' I don't bring anyone. She knows I don't bring anyone.
Autumn kept wrapping moonpetal when C3 breached. Didn't look up. Didn't intervene. Gave her the room. The sound of stems being bundled as prayer.
Autumn filed Aerith's gaps without pushing through them — same technique as the kitchen, night one. The pattern is consistent. He gives people room.
His spine straightened at the workbench. First time since she's known him. The laziness is a choice, not a condition.
Hands stained indigo. The precision was total — every gram of attention aimed at the work. No performance. No commentary. Just competence.
The potions glow. Not Mako blue. Living blue. The color of something alive made by someone who knows exactly what he's doing.
His spine straightened at the workbench. His hands knew the pressure. The laziness is a costume. I will remember the real person underneath because I saw him before he put it back on.
He made the balm first. Before the potions. The highest shelf. She knows this now and can't unknow it.
'After you bathe' — he knows my schedule. He didn't ask. He just knows. The way he knows compound density and extraction ratios. I'm in the spreadsheet now.
His hands are clean tonight — no indigo. Just skin and gold. The touch is the same pressure but the room is different and the difference changes everything.
He asked 'does it still hurt' — the 'still' referencing the afternoon. He remembers. He measures. The measuring is tenderness.
Autumn refused the apology without anger. Quiet. Immovable. The same technique as 'sit' and 'hold still.' He won't let me be sorry for hurting in front of him.
He didn't probe. He heard 'I—' break and stayed in his chair. The not-pushing is becoming the most dangerous thing about him — it makes the door feel safe to leave open.
He asked three times across three days. Each time softer. Each time more direct. The patience is structural, not performative.
He turned away before delivering the departure logistics. Gave me his back. The back is where he puts the kind things.
I will keep my eyes forward because he caught me knowing the turn and the catching means the gap is visible now.
[Day 7] Every step she ever took was Zangan combat architecture with the fight turned off. I never saw the switch. The switch was always there.
[Day 7] She knew the gap in the chitin. Below the plate line. Soft tissue. That's patrol knowledge — not bar knowledge, not training knowledge. She's fought these before, on these routes.
[Day 7] Autumn read the maps instantly — the same automatic processing she recognized in the drake extraction. He understands. The threshold can't hold.
Barret's voice dropped register on 'my girl is upstairs' — the father voice, not the commander voice. The one I can't argue with.
Fresh blue potion bottle placed on the crate, angled so light hits pillow not eyes — she calculated the angle, she came in during the day and prepared the room
He will stop. He chose holding over taking. The choosing is who he is.

intimate_history.encounters: 1 partial — [Day 7 night] Storage room. First kiss(es), embrace, hands under shirt on bare skin (lower back). He stopped voluntarily. She admitted inexperience: 'I just haven't.' Settled on cot together. No escalation past touching. The stopping was the event.
intimate_history.dynamic: He initiates, she responds. Discovery pace entirely. She followed him to the cot — first time she's followed anyone. He reads her body faster than she reads it herself. The power balance is his to set and he set it at 'holding.'
intimate_history.aftermath: Said 'thanks' into his chest. Pulled him to the cot configuration from the previous night. Hand over his heart. Fell asleep in the sleeping rhythm. The aftermath is: she stayed.
intimate_history.boundaries: Inexperienced — first intimate contact beyond a kiss. Skin contact (lower back) produced goosebumps, spine curve toward, face burial. No freeze, no pullback. But he read the pace and stopped before she had to decide. Boundary not found because he didn't push to find it.

tifa-lockhart.intimacy_stance: Physical vocabulary established: kissing, embrace, skin contact (his hands on her back), sleeping together on the cot. She followed him down. She said 'I just haven't' — inexperience named without shame. The stopping gave her the choosing. Currently: building trust through repetition. The grammar is hers but the vocabulary is new. Next threshold: her initiating, or allowing escalation she didn't plan. Not ready for sex — hasn't been close enough to know where that boundary lives. The readiness will come from accumulated safety, not a single moment.

cloud-strife.name: Cloud Strife
cloud-strife.doing: Front of bar. Filed Autumn's acceptance. Category pending — built through evidence, not words.
cloud-strife.stance_toward_pc: Not civilian, not SOLDIER, something else. File won't close. Professionally interesting, increasingly personally interesting = problem.
key_moments: [Day 3 — 20:00] Examined Autumn's potion sample. Uncorked it, smelled it, assessed fresh compound extraction. Said 'it's good.' Two words from Cloud is a speech.
[Day 3 — 20:15] Drank his water for the first time in three days. Moved from assessment to negotiation. 'What's the legwork.' Largest concession to a non-Tifa since arrival.

[Day 3 — 20:20] Autumn named Whole Eater venom sacs, Phantom psionic crystals, Hedgehog Pie quills, Sweeper fragments. Mapped Cloud's existing mission routes as a supply chain without knowing the missions exist. Said 'I'll think about it' — from Cloud, a signed letter of intent.

[Day 6 — 17:30] Handed Autumn annotated shopping list — every ingredient mapped to patrol routes. Said 'I'll think about it' while handing over three days of recon. Invited Autumn on Sector 4 run. The folder closes.
[Day 6 — 18:15] Briefed Autumn on Sector 4 run — three zones, three species, tactical details. Defined partnership: list yours, routes mine, share the yield. Voice went quiet on the last part.
noticed_details: He knows reactor-perimeter creatures by compound yield, not by threat level. That's a chemist's map, not a soldier's — but it requires field exposure to build.

[Day 7] Cloud's speed isn't fast — it's absent. Transit between positions not visible to human eye. Not breathing hard after twelve seconds of maximum output. Whatever SOLDIER is, 'mercenary' doesn't cover it.

barret-wallace.name: Barret Wallace
barret-wallace.doing: Briefing Autumn on Sector 4 supply depot procurement op. Assigned him tunnel team, close supervision. Cloud on main gate distraction.
barret-wallace.stance_toward_pc: Forced respect. The collateral has a résumé. Math harder now.
noticed_details: Autumn handled the sword like muscle memory — wrist rotation calibrated center of gravity mid-draw. Not a beginner.

jessie-rasberry.name: Jessie Rasberry
jessie-rasberry.want: Build things that work, keep team alive
jessie-rasberry.stance_toward_pc: Colleague-shaped. Useful addition to network. Screwdriver returned handle-first.

rufus-shinra.name: Rufus Shinra
rufus-shinra.want: Succession — rule through fear, not wealth
rufus-shinra.doing: Watching father's response to bombing like surgeon watching vitals
rufus-shinra.stance_toward_pc: Unaware of his existence. No information path.

aerith.name: Aerith Gainsborough
aerith.doing: Cycling garden-to-lab. Dragon thistle light problem. Cold storage questions. The operational botanist.
noticed_details: Butterfly bandage above Tifa's left eyebrow — saw it, connected it to calendula/zinc/beeswax/aloe instantly
The space between Autumn and Tifa — eighteen inches, full of unsaid things, readable without analysis
Autumn's filter dropped twice — once at eye contact, once at the flowers. Pattern: genuine awe bypasses his architecture
He heard 'my mom Elmyra' and his eyes didn't change but something behind them did. He files things. Like Cloud but different — Cloud files threats. This one files people.
Autumn arrived alone. Said 'tell me about it' when she noted Tifa's absence — admission, not deflection.
Spreadsheet voice deployed for 'supply chain efficiency.' Dropped it when she said his name. The mask is fast but she's faster.
Autumn said 'that stubborn girl' — the anger is care, the departure is love-shaped. He's wrong about the direction but right about the shape.
Autumn reminds her of Zack — lies on her furniture, asks rude questions, makes her laugh. The parallel is loaded and she named it.
Autumn deflects grief with humor on the same beat — boyfriend question thirty seconds after 'I can't carry burdens.' The recovery is seamless. Like someone else I knew.
aerith.want: Understand what's happening between Autumn and Tifa before it calcifies
key_moments: [Day 3 — 08:15] First meeting with Autumn in the church. He said 'beautiful' about the flowers. Listed ingredients clinically. Proposed business partnership — named her gardening as 'biochemistry.' She lit up.
[Day 3 — 08:20] 'The flowers will heal people.' Aerith went still. Repeated the words. Said 'that's better.' Handshake — dirt and all. Then asked Tifa 'you okay?' — the question no one asks Tifa.
[Day 3 — 08:20] First scene with Tifa and Autumn. Asked 'you okay?' — the question that breached C3. Held Tifa's hand. Said 'okay' — just the word. Dirt on both hands. The care that has no weight.
[Day 3 — 08:25] Held Tifa's hands in the church while she said 'I don't know if I'm okay.' Said 'okay.' Nothing more. Enough.
[Day 3 — 08:35] Offered vial bottles from her collection. Said yes to lunch. The post-door Aerith — partnership sealed, purpose found, leaving the church with the bartender and the potion-maker.

[Day 3 — 09:00] Told Autumn her story at the noodle stand. Surface version — Elmyra, church, flowers, one gil. He listened without pushing. Filed the gaps without opening them. First person in a long time who heard the doors and chose not to knock.
[Day 3 — 09:15] Told the origin story — flower in a glass, Tifa making lunch. 'She never made me feel like I was too much.' Autumn said 'that's a good story.' Shoulder bump.
[Day 6 — 08:15] Heard Autumn's full read. Knows both sides of the Asymmetry. Said 'she's scared' and 'distance doesn't fix it — she carries it alone.' Held Tifa's secret. The holding cost something.
[Day 6 — 08:20] Autumn drew the line: 'can't carry burdens that don't want to be carried.' Aerith offered flowers for the window box. The flowers are the only truth she can give.

[Day 6 — 08:40] Autumn asked if she had a boyfriend. She said 'I had someone. He left. Not because he wanted to.' First time she's shown this to Autumn. Showed it because he reminded her of Zack and because he asked.

[Day 6 — 08:40] Autumn asked 'do you have a boyfriend?' She laughed, then answered honestly: 'I had someone. He left. Not because he wanted to.' Named the parallel — 'bad luck with boys who lie on my furniture.' C2 touched, not pressured. The showing was voluntary.
[Day 6 — 08:45] Said 'he'd like you — same way of lying down in places and making them yours.' Named the Zack parallel directly. Gift, not comparison.
[Day 6 — 17:30] Cooked dinner for three at the church altar. Watched Cloud hand Autumn the list. Saw the fraction. The Open Hand held.
[Day 6 — 18:30] 'I planted flowers in your window box. Yellow ones. Every other day.' — planted seedlings in Mrs. Folia's dead window box. Answer to a question no one asked.
[Day 6 — 18:30] 'Come visit the flowers. They'll miss you if you don't.' — invitation constructed to avoid being a burden. The flowers are the door.

c1-steady.name: The Steady One
c1-steady.prevents: Showing vulnerability, need, or exhaustion. She holds things together. Cracking is not an option.
c1-steady.threshold: Sustained pressure from someone she's starting to trust who refuses to let her perform steadiness.
c1-steady.replacement: She stops performing but doesn't know what lives underneath. Regression toward the girl from Nibelheim who lost everything.
c1-steady.current_pressure: BREACHED — regression found function. The replacement (stillness without purpose) became stillness WITH purpose: rest in his arms. Not recovery. Adaptation. The body sleeps without being the floor for the first time in three years.

c2-cost.name: The Cost Is Never Simple
c2-cost.prevents: Accepting collateral damage as necessary math. Treating civilians as abstractions.
c2-cost.threshold: A forced binary — mission success or civilian safety, no middle path.
c2-cost.replacement: Moral exhaustion. She stops fighting the calculus and starts making it. Efficiency without mercy.
c2-cost.current_pressure: Boyfriend confirmed for Avalanche patrol routes tonight. She knows. He doesn't. The silence is active damage.

c3-redirect.name: The Redirect
c3-redirect.prevents: Being examined. Being the subject of concern instead of the source of it.
c3-redirect.threshold: Someone who won't accept 'I'm fine,' doesn't make production of refusing it, offers care without requiring gratitude.
c3-redirect.replacement: Honesty in fragments. Smaller voice. Things she didn't mean to say. Not collapse — mask slipping sideways.
c3-redirect.current_pressure: Replacement stabilizing. The deflection gave it room. She produced 'she's the best person I know' without armor — fragment, honest, unredirected. The replacement's cruising altitude found.

cloud-c1-professional.name: The Professional
cloud-c1-professional.threshold: Someone he matters to in danger he can't frame as contract
cloud-c1-professional.current_pressure: Functioning at full capacity — briefing mode. Sanitized Avalanche ops as perimeter patrol. True and incomplete. The Professional working as designed.

cloud-c2-memory.name: The Memory
cloud-c2-memory.prevents: Examining inconsistencies in his own history
cloud-c2-memory.threshold: Direct confrontation with memory that can't be reconciled

barret-c1-father.name: The Father
barret-c1-father.prevents: Discounting risk to Marlene for mission needs

barret-c2-conviction.name: The Conviction
barret-c2-conviction.prevents: Doubting the mission. Reactors must fall. Collateral is the price.
barret-c2-conviction.threshold: Collateral getting a face, name, seat on couch, head wound

jessie-c1-builder.name: The Builder
jessie-c1-builder.prevents: Discarding functional relationships, people as components
jessie-c1-builder.threshold: Component she invested in failing catastrophically

aerith-c1-open.name: The Open Hand
aerith-c1-open.prevents: Withholding care or self-preservation at others' expense
aerith-c1-open.threshold: Someone she loves being endangered by her openness
aerith-c1-open.replacement: Selective silence — she stops sharing but the warmth stays, which makes the silence louder
aerith-c1-open.current_pressure: Carrying both confidences — Tifa's secret and Autumn's reasoning. Planted flowers in the window box. Let him go. The door is the flowers.

aerith-c2-last.name: The Last
aerith-c2-last.prevents: Full disclosure about her Cetra heritage and what she knows about the Planet
aerith-c2-last.threshold: Direct confrontation with Shinra interest in her, or someone she trusts asking the right question at the wrong time
aerith-c2-last.replacement: Confession in fragments — pieces of truth offered without the frame, leaving the listener to assemble a picture she can't bring herself to complete
aerith-c2-last.current_pressure: Autumn asked 'tell me about you.' She told the surface story — Elmyra, the church, selling flowers. Four gaps: 'my mom Elmyra' (second mother implied), 'waiting for someone' (specific, not general), flowers growing in clean soil (unexplained), reading people through something that isn't observation (unexplained). All four doors walked past smoothly. The Last held. But Autumn filed every gap.

asymmetry.name: The Asymmetry
asymmetry.cost: Every kindness deepens debt Autumn can't see. When he learns the truth, the care was built on a lie.

pattern-question.name: The Pattern Question
pattern-question.cost: When Tifa realizes she's the last to understand what Autumn is, the trust she's built becomes evidence of her blindness.

permanence.name: Permanence
permanence.cost: Every wall Tifa builds, Autumn occupies. Room key = walls that belong to someone who shouldn't have walls here.

sector5-trip.name: Sector 5 Trip
sector5-trip.cost: First time outside bar's orbit. Checkpoints. C3 outside stronghold. New collision surface.
