shinra.name: Shinra Electric Power Company
shinra.objective: Maintain control, deploy deliberate sabotage narrative
shinra.stance_toward_pc: Unaware — any civilian from Sector 1 is suspect
shinra.last_move: [Day 7] Carver flagged Autumn temp card 15:47 — seventh crossing, no work permit. Enhanced monitoring: next crossing triggers photograph. One of forty flags.
shinra.momentum: Data accumulation — transit audit processing forty flags. Enhanced checkpoint hardware across sectors. Patrol circuits logging pedestrian activity.

avalanche.name: Avalanche (Barret's cell)
avalanche.objective: Destroy Mako reactors one by one
avalanche.stance_toward_pc: Autumn becoming infrastructure; Barret stood down; Jessie colleague; Tifa funding startup
avalanche.last_move: [Day 7] Barret conditionally accepted Autumn. Wednesday 0600 assigned. Route briefed by Tifa. Gear selection morning.

relations.Autumn Liang: Conditional operative. Terms: Marlene's safety non-negotiable. Probationary.

avalanche.momentum: Wednesday 0600 topside op. First joint operation with full roster including Autumn. Gear selection and briefing pending.

world.world_state: Day 8 morning 0517. Avalanche first full-roster op at 0600. Autumn in basement gear room with Barret. Tifa already up, left Cure materia and water. Cloud location unknown. Marlene asleep. Shinra enhanced patrols active. Carver flag live — ninth crossing today triggers photograph.
pressure_points: The Photograph: Autumn's ninth sector crossing triggers Carver's photo protocol. Wednesday topside = ninth crossing. A face enters Shinra's system.
First Blood: Autumn's first Avalanche op. Never fought humans. Tifa's C2 at CRITICAL watching him walk into the machine.
Jessie's Charges: Autumn saw explosive components in staging cache. Alchemist meets demolitions expert. Who asks first?

constants.voice: Grounded, close-third, sensory. Short sentences under pressure. Longer when scene breathes. Physical details earn emotional weight. Dialogue clipped and real.
constants.tone: Consequences real and lingering. Strangers guarded but human. Trust 2-4 scenes to earn. Winning complicated but satisfying. Help reluctant or transactional. Baseline tense but alive.
constants.tone_rules: 1. Weight earns release — never sustain grimness more than two beats. 2. Inhabited not analyzed — interiority through gestures. 3. Hope is concrete — show the stubborn small thing.
constants.motivation: Survive the immediate crisis. Discover what draws Autumn into Midgar's war.
constants.objective: Get through this encounter with the unknown woman and reach safety

pc.name: Autumn Liang
demonstrated_traits: Gentle authority — pulled her in with minimal force. 'Silly girl' delivered as affection, not diminishment. The pull was gravity, not command. Let her body find its own position.
Stillness as gift — held Tifa without speaking, moving, or performing. Applied his laziness as care. The not-doing is the thing she named and he delivered it physically.
Physical tenderness without performance — moved sleeping Tifa onto cot, covered with blanket, held through night. No ceremony. The efficiency IS the care.

Playful deflation after intensity — 'whatever should I do with you now' deployed at three inches after holding her all night. Uses lightness to test new emotional territory. The teasing is not avoidance — it's the first language of the new morning.
Counts people before they arrive — four eggs for three people, Marlene included before she descended.

Shape-reading and mercy architecture — reads situations several steps ahead, acts through withdrawal or logistics. Departure was mercy, not escape. Drops mask with trusted people (Aerith: 'that stubborn girl'). Names limits honestly.

Lightness as intimacy vehicle — teasing, logistics, callbacks all serve as emotional delivery systems. 'I can be worse' and 'cancel the rent' carry the same weight as confessions in other people's mouths.
Takes her hand at the checkpoint. Public intimacy without calculation — the not-calculating is genuine.
Walks into Shinra checkpoint holding Avalanche member's hand without hesitation. Not bravery — the not-calculating is genuine.

[Day 7] Read Avalanche staging point maps instantly — reactor schematics, patrol timings, infiltration routes. No visible panic. No questions yet. The processing happened before the decision to process.
[Day 7] Saw Avalanche staging cache — maps, charges, materia, reactor schematics — and kept walking. No questions. No shock. The processing was complete before his feet stopped moving.
[Day 7] Took Tifa's hand and issued a cryptic operational warning while strolling behind Cloud through Avalanche's patrol route — tenderness and tactical awareness in the same gesture.

reputation.Shinra: Unknown. No file. Civilian near Reactor 1 blast — potential suspect if identified. Checkpoints tightening. Sector 5 trip increases exposure.
reputation.Avalanche: Not a threat. A problem becoming an asset. Barret stood down. Cloud's file won't close. Jessie filed contradiction. Sixth mug as silent vote.
reputation.Tifa Lockhart: Claimed her in front of Barret. Confessed the staying was a choice made on the cot. She called him an idiot. Hand on hand.
reputation.Barret Wallace: Conditionally accepted. 'Aight.' Wednesday 0600 assigned. Terms: Marlene's safety non-negotiable.
reputation.Cloud Strife: Partner. List yours, routes mine, share the yield. The Professional defined terms and went quiet on the last sentence. Wednesday oh-six-hundred.
reputation.Marle: Met Day 3 morning. 'Autumn. I'm new.' She said 'I can see that.' Wrapped jars slowly. Filed the shape.
reputation.Aerith Gainsborough: Partners. First misread — assumed she was briefed. She wasn't. She reads weather, not files. He's outside his own filing system with her. Asking for housing.
reputation.Sector 7 regulars: The new guy at Seventh Heaven makes potions that actually work. Blue ones. Cheap. Word spreading.
reputation.Marlene: Makes eggs. Puts salt on them. Tifa doesn't. Jury still out but the plate went to the sink.

timeline: [Day 1 — 21:10] Pulled from Reactor 1 rubble by Tifa Lockhart. Head wound (minor).
[Day 1 — 21:15] Heard survivor knocking in burning apartment. Ran inside. Tifa followed.
[Day 1 — 21:25] Engineered stairwell collapse to block Shinra sweep team. Evacuated via fire escape.
[Day 1 — 21:35] Alley. Survivor directed to Dr. Kunsel's clinic. Gave Tifa his name.
[Day 1 — 22:00] Arrived Seventh Heaven. Tifa cleaned his wound. Pointed out she treated his before hers.
[Day 1 — 22:06] Asked to borrow money and food. Tifa refused payment, fed him stew.
[Day 1 — 22:13] Offered the couch. Accepted. Night ended.
[Day 2 — 06:18] Stood between Barret's gun-arm and Tifa. 'Don't speak to her like that.' Offered to leave.
[Day 2 — 06:31] Called Tifa 'investor.' Wrote ingredient list with white balm footnote. Closed eyes.
[Day 2 — 06:48] Fixed Jessie's signal relay. Sandbagging collapsed. Declared 'earned lunch.' Claimed couch.
[Day 2 — 18:45] Accepted storage room. Key received. Old brass, worn.
[Day 3 — 06:41] 'I'm totally not your boyfriend.' At Marle's door. Social disruption.
[Day 3 — 07:08] 'First batch tonight, open shop tomorrow.' Collapsed Tifa's three-day Sector 5 deferral.
[Day 3 — 07:25] The playground. Sunlight through the plate crack. Whispered 'beautiful.' First unguarded moment — the lazy filter dropped. Tifa turned. Saw him. Said 'yeah.'
[Day 3 — 07:45] Arrived at Sector 5 church with Tifa. Saw the flowers. Filter dropped. Met unnamed woman tending the garden — pink dress, ribbon, smile-first. 'You never bring anyone.'
[Day 3 — 08:15] Arrived at Sector 5 church. Met Aerith Gainsborough. Small wave. Flowers growing from clean soil under broken roof. Aerith: 'you never bring anyone.'

[Day 3 — 08:15] Listed ingredients to Aerith at Sector 5 church. Moonpetal, nettle, calendula. Aerith connected the white balm to Tifa's scar in one syllable — 'oh.' Tifa's hand went to the bandage with zero interval.

[Day 3 — 09:15] Met Aerith Gainsborough at Sector 5 church. Thanked her by name. Received summer-press calendula, 10 moonpetal stems, dried mako nettle. Glanced at Tifa watching from the flower bed edge.
[Day 3 — 08:15] Proposed business partnership to Aerith at Sector 5 church. Organics supply in exchange for a cut of every batch. Aerith lit up. Tifa said 'he does this.'
[Day 3 — 08:20] Witnessed Tifa's C3 breach in Aerith's church. Kept wrapping moonpetal. Didn't intervene. Heard 'someone' and knew he was the someone.
[Day 3 — 08:25] Walked to back garden during Tifa's C3 breach. Counted nettle stems, assessed soil composition, pulled a weed. Gave Tifa and Aerith the room. Heard fragments. Didn't listen.
[Day 3 — 08:35] Proposed lunch, declared enough ingredients to skip Wall Market. Aerith supplied bottles. Production line assembled on church workbench. Noodle stand chosen.
[Day 3 — 09:00] Noodle stand, Sector 5. Asked Aerith about herself. Filed four structural gaps in her story without pursuing them. Tifa watched and recognized the pattern from night one.

[Day 3 — 09:15] Noodle stand, Sector 5. Finished lunch with Tifa and Aerith. 'That's a good story.' Aerith bumped his shoulder. Supply bag handed to Autumn. 'Same time next week' — recurring trip established.
[Day 3 — 14:00] First potion batch. Six bottles, luminous blue, professional grade. Fresh moonpetal, three-day nettle, Aerith's summer-press calendula on standby. The Sun.
[Day 3 — 14:30] First potion batch complete. Six bottles, luminous blue, professional grade. Tifa watched from doorway. Said 'I'm glad you're here.' Autumn said 'Yeap?' and cleaned the counter.
[Day 3 — 14:35] Asked Tifa to sit. She did. First time she stopped being useful voluntarily. The Steady One stood down.
[Day 3 — 14:45] Applied white balm to Tifa's wound. Peeled bandage. Two layers, July calendula. 'Most people won't notice.' Twelve inches. Eyes closed. 'Like it's working.' The loop closed.
[Day 3 — 20:00] Showed Cloud a potion sample at the bar. Cloud said 'it's good.' Two potions already sold. Invited Cloud for drinks outside Seventh Heaven.
[Day 3 — 20:15] Proposed combat supply partnership with Cloud. Named field reagents, combat applications, fifty-fifty split. Cloud engaged — moved from assessment to negotiation.
[Day 3 — 20:25] Insisted first potion revenue goes to Aerith. Rounded 13 to 15 gil. Fair dealing as principle, applied by the man Avalanche made homeless.
[Day 3 — 20:30] Delivered second-balm reminder with clinical casualness. Retreated to couch with magazine. Evening settling.

[Day 3 — 22:35] Second balm application. Asked 'does it still hurt?' — night version. Tifa said 'not the kind that medicine fixes.' Apologized. Autumn said 'for what?' She tried to answer. Got to 'you lost everything' and couldn't finish.
[Day 6 — 07:25] Heard Tifa's confession shape. Deduced he is the center of her debt. Announced plan to move to Sector 5. 'Creature of comforts.' The departure is mercy shaped like logistics.
[Day 6 — 07:45] Left Seventh Heaven without seeing Tifa. No note. Bought breakfast at a stall. Walked to Sector 5 alone. First morning without the ritual.

[Day 1-3] Ch1-3: Pulled from rubble by Tifa. Built potion lab in her basement. Met Avalanche, Aerith. Supply chain operational. 'More fortune than regret.' Six mornings of white balm. Scar almost gone. The Asymmetry at zero.
[Day 6 — 07:20] Ch4: Final balm. Tifa gave the shape of the secret. Autumn deduced he's the center. Announced departure. Left without note. At Aerith's church asking about Mrs. Folia's unit.

[Day 6 — 08:15] Dropped mask with Aerith at church. Named the shape: Tifa is hiding something, hurting herself over it, and his presence makes it worse. Asked for housing in Sector 5. Aerith agreed. Aerith said: 'Distance doesn't fix what she's carrying. She carries it alone.'

[Day 3 — 20:00] Ch3: Evening — Cloud partnership. Showed sample, proposed combat supply deal. Cloud drank water (first time), said 'I'll think about it.' Monster list maps mission routes. Paid Aerith first. Tifa absorbed the contrast.
[Day 6 — 08:40] Asked Aerith about boyfriend. She answered: 'I had someone. He left.' Zack parallel. Napping on her blanket in the church. Mrs. Folia's unit confirmed for tomorrow.
[Day 6 — 08:45] Said 'I'm sorry' to Aerith about her loss. Received the Zack parallel — 'he'd like you.' Fell asleep in the church.

[Day 6 — 17:30] Woke from nine-hour nap in Aerith's church. Cloud waiting — had been there since 4pm. Dinner for three. Cloud handed annotated shopping list with patrol routes mapped. Invited Autumn on Sector 4 run. Pattern Question resolving.
[Day 6 — 18:15] Received tactical briefing from Cloud — Sector 4 run Wednesday. Three zones. Accepted partnership terms.
[Day 6 — 18:30] Returned to Seventh Heaven evening. Bar open. Tifa behind counter. Came to pack.

[Day 6 — 19:30] Returned to Seventh Heaven to pack. Told Tifa he's moving to Sector 5. Walked toward basement door. Tifa's C1 breached — 'You're wrong. You're not making it worse. You're the only thing that's been making it better.' And: 'I can't tell you why. But you're wrong about the shape.' The High Priestess drew.

[Day 6 — 22:35] Said 'I can't discern if the warmth is guilt or something else. Coming close feels like taking advantage.' Tifa answered: both. Guilt is real, the other thing is real, can't separate them. The fence held. The shape given, not deduced.

[Day 6 — 22:40] Asked Tifa 'what am I to you now, where do you put us.' She couldn't categorize. Described him through mornings. Found the deeper confession: she doesn't know where she goes. Hand open on the chair arm.
[Day 6 — 22:45] Ch4 climax: Offered his hand. She reached. First touch without medical framing. She said 'I go here.' The twelve inches halved.
[Day 6 — 22:50] Pulled Tifa from the chair. 'Silly girl.' First embrace. She shook — not crying, muscles releasing years of load-bearing. Hands settled. Longest breath. Distance zero.
[Day 6 — 23:00] Ch4 close: Put Tifa on the cot. Blanket. Slept holding her. She gripped his shirt in her sleep. The building stood without her. Wednesday is coming.
[Day 7 — 06:49] Cancelled Sector 5 departure. Confirmed 'boyfriend.' Second kiss. Tifa said 'you're staying' — not a question. Marlene woke. Tifa went upstairs. Door open.

[Day 7 — 06:55] Went upstairs. Made coffee and breakfast in Tifa's kitchen. First domestic morning as someone who's staying. Marlene came down — 'you're making eggs.' Tifa in doorway, hair unfixed. The building's new shape.
[Day 7 — 07:15] Made breakfast for three. Marlene said 'you put salt on them.' Carried her own plate. The verdict.

[Days 1-3] Pulled from Reactor 1 rubble by Tifa. Joined Seventh Heaven. Built potion lab. Met Aerith — supplier partnership. First batch. White balm. 'Not the cut.' 'More fortune than regret.' C1 CRITICAL.
[Day 6] Final balm. Departure announced. Left for Sector 5. Aerith warned. Cloud partnership — annotated list, Wednesday run. Returned. C1 BREACHED. 'I go here.' Cot. Held all night.
[Day 7 — 06:47] Woke with Tifa. Teased. First kiss. Second kiss. Cancelled rent mid-kiss. 'You're staying.' Marlene woke. Bookmark kiss. Made breakfast for three.
[Day 1-2] Pulled from Reactor 1 rubble by Tifa. Seventh Heaven. Survived Barret. Fixed things. Got a key. Temporary became permanent.

[Day 3] Met Aerith — business partnership. C3 breached (church, Aerith's hands). First potions: six blue, professional grade. White balm applied. 'Not the cut.' 'More fortune than regret.' C1 CRITICAL. Cloud partnership formed — patrol routes shared.

[Day 6] Final balm. Tifa gave the shape: 'debt with no number.' Autumn deduced himself as center. Announced Sector 5 departure. Told Aerith the truth. Aerith warned distance doesn't fix it. Cloud delivered annotated list — Wednesday Sector 4 run. Returned to pack. C1 BREACHED. 'You're the only thing making it better.' Storage room confession. 'I go here.' Hand taken. Slept on the cot.

[Day 7 — 06:47] Woke with Tifa. Teased — she blushed. First kiss. 'I can be worse.' Second kiss — she kissed back harder. Cancelled rent mid-kiss. 'You're staying.' Bookmark kiss. Made breakfast for three. Marlene's verdict: plate to sink. Asked to visit Aerith.
[Day 7 — 07:35] Walking to Sector 5 with Tifa. First outing as couple. Checkpoint has new hardware — second guard, scanner. Tifa clocked it first.
[Day 7 — 07:50] Ch5: Walked into Aerith's church hand-in-hand with Tifa. Aerith read the entire night in three seconds. 'Oh, finally.' Tifa blushed. The insufferable begins.

[Day 7 — 06:47-07:50] Ch5 Morning: First kiss on the cot. 'I can be worse.' Called himself boyfriend, cancelled Sector 5 rent. Marlene's egg audit: 'Tifa doesn't put salt on them.' Walked hand-in-hand to Sector 5 — new scanner at checkpoint, eighth crossing logged. Aerith read the night in three seconds: 'Oh, finally.' Church lab restocked. Noodle lunch — Aerith put noodle on Tifa's nose. Cloud's run tonight confirmed. Afternoon on the cot — shoulder contact, no task. Carver (Floor 14) flagged temp card 7-V-4409 at 15:47: enhanced monitoring, next crossing triggers photograph.
[Day 7 — 18:43] Responded to Avalanche reveal with deadpan humor — 'brutal torture and interrogation.' Signaled: not scared, questions coming, on his terms. Tifa almost laughed. Fingers interlocked.

[Day 7 — 18:50] Emerged from Avalanche route into Seventh Heaven. Barret waiting at debrief table — quiet, not angry, worse. Tower drawn. Hands still interlocked with Tifa's. The compartmentalization collapsed.
[Day 7] Claimed Tifa in front of Barret ('mine is upstairs too') and volunteered to join Avalanche. Barret's conditional: Marlene's safety is the price.
[Day 7 — 18:54] Formally accepted into Avalanche cell. Barret's conditional: Marlene's safety non-negotiable. Wednesday 0600 topside route. Tifa to brief.
[Day 7] Told Tifa he stayed because he couldn't bear to leave. Checkmate. Joined Avalanche formally.
[Day 7 — 18:58] First kiss with Tifa at the bar table after Barret accepted him into Avalanche
[Day 7 — 19:02] Headed to wash up. Dropped 'only if you are joining me' over his shoulder — invitation as exit line.
[Day 7 — 19:28] Kissed Tifa slowly in storage room. Made good on the 'my girl' claim. Private, deliberate, unhurried.
[Day 7 — 19:35] Stopped intimate escalation. Pulled hands from Tifa's skin, held tight instead. She said thanks.
[Day 8 — 05:22] Entered Avalanche basement armory. Barret assessing. Gear selection pending.
pc.doing: Planning to move to Sector 5. Visiting Aerith to ask about rental properties near the church.
traits: Watched Cloud and Tifa fight without flinching. Counted twelve seconds. Filed the coordination, the anatomy knowledge, the speed. Observer, not participant. The bag was ready before the body stopped moving.
Selected infantry sword with instinctive handling — not just support
Deflects direct questions about killing with capability statements. Trained but untested in lethal combat.

intimate_history.Tifa Lockhart: Night 6: slept together on cot, held her seven hours, heartbeat steady. Day 7 18:58: first kiss, light, at the bar table after Barret left. She pressed his hand, closed her eyes. Storage room confirmed as shared space.

readings: XVII The Star — real sunlight through a crack in the plate at the Sector 6-7 border. Tifa stopped at the edge of the light. Her face unguarded. The stubborn small thing: a bench, a wind chime, vines growing from poison, and gold light on rubble.
XVII The Star — playground sunlight through the plate crack. Hope is concrete: a bench, a wind chime, vines growing from poison, a whisper, a 'yeah.'
XIX The Sun — clarity and success on the first potion batch. The rare clean win. Ingredients perfect, technique perfect, result luminous.

XIV Temperance — balance and synthesis during white balm application. The middle path: not confession, not deflection. Medicine as language. Twelve inches. Both knowing, neither saying. The room can hold 'most people won't notice' and cannot hold the rest. Enough.
XIX The Sun — clarity between Autumn and Cloud. Competence as bridge. The rare clean win: Cloud acknowledged the work.
XI Justice — Autumn's grace is Tifa's punishment. The math is exact: the man who lost everything calls her fortune. Every kindness is a consequence she cannot escape.
XXI The World — cycle closes. Autumn sees the full shape: he is the center of Tifa's debt. The infrastructure phase ends. The departure begins.

story_summary.text: Ch1 'Wrong Place': Tifa pulls Autumn from Reactor 1 rubble. Both enter burning building to save trapped survivor. Autumn engineers stairwell collapse. They reach Seventh Heaven. Tifa cleans his wound first. Stew, couch, silence. Asymmetry established — she knows everything, he knows nothing.

Ch2 'The Hunt Begins': Avalanche returns to find Autumn on couch. Barret's gun-arm, Autumn's stew joke, standing between gun and Tifa. Stood down. Coffee. Ingredient list with white balm footnote. Fixed Jessie's relay (sandbagging collapsed). Fixed water filter. Asked for room. Key received. Temporary became permanent.

Ch3 'The Infrastructure' (in progress): Walk to Marle's. 'Boyfriend' over-correction. Marle clocks the shape. White balm ingredients witnessed. 'Good bones, Tifa.' Arms uncross. Three sentences about Sector 5 contact leak. Schedule collapsed — first batch tonight. Sector 5 trip imminent.

Ch3: Sector 5 church. Met Aerith. Flowers, sunlight through broken roof. Autumn proposed business partnership — Aerith as organic supplier. She lit up. Tifa said 'he does this' and smiled the real smile.

[Day 3 — 08:25] Ch3: Autumn walked to the back garden. Tifa and Aerith alone in the church. 'I don't know if I'm okay.' C3 breached. Hands held. Dirt transferred. Autumn counted nettle and pulled a weed and didn't hear.
[Day 3 — 08:45] Ch3: Noodle stand, Sector 5. First post-breach meal. Three bowls, extra for everyone. Shoulder bump. Broth on chin. Post-smile. The replacement functions. Permanence arrived.

[Day 3 — 14:00] Ch3: First potion batch. Six bottles, luminous blue, professional grade. The Sun delivered. Tifa watched from the doorway. Said his name in the voice at the bottom. The storage room glows.
[Day 3 — 14:30] Ch3: First batch complete. Six luminous blue potions, professional grade. The Sun delivered. Tifa said 'I'm glad you're here' in the voice at the bottom. Permanence resolving.

[Day 3 — 14:45] Ch3: White balm applied. Temperance. Autumn peeled the bandage, applied two layers of July-calendula balm to Tifa's wound. She closed her eyes. Hands released on knees. 'Like it's working.' Both meanings. Twelve inches. Permanence resolved.

[Day 3 — 14:50] Ch3: Autumn asked 'does it hurt?' after applying white balm. Tifa said 'not the cut.' Couldn't finish 'for—'. Said 'I know you did.' C1 held at critical. Asymmetry reached distance zero — the collision is here, living in the silence between what she knows and what he doesn't.

[Day 3 — 15:00] Ch3: Autumn broke the tension with a stretch and 'your problem now.' Tifa said 'she's the best person I know' about Aerith — first unarmored statement since C3 breach. Almost-laugh in the doorway. He caught her hand moving toward the wound. The ordinary returned. It was enough.

[Day 3 — 20:00] Ch3: Timeskip — afternoon rest, evening rush. Tifa sold two potions first night. Autumn showed Cloud a sample. Cloud said 'it's good' (a speech, from him). Pattern Question at distance 1. Autumn invited Cloud for drinks outside Seventh Heaven.

[Day 3 — 20:15] Ch3: Autumn proposed combat supply partnership with Cloud. Named combat applications beyond potions. Cloud drank his water for the first time. Moved from assessment to negotiation. 'What's the legwork.' Tifa watched from behind the bar, post-smile, dry glass.

[Day 3 — 20:20] Ch3: Autumn named monster hunting as the legwork — specific creatures, specific parts, specific compounds. Cloud recognized his own mission routes in the shopping list. Said 'I'll think about it.' Pattern Question at dist:1, folder buckling.

[Day 3 — 20:25] Ch3: Autumn insisted on paying Aerith first from potion sales. Rounded up her cut. Tifa absorbed the moral contrast in silence. Cloud noticed new weight on Tifa. Asymmetry at zero — every ethical instinct is an indictment.
[Day 3 — 22:30] Ch3: Second balm application. Night. Bar closed. Hair down. Eyes open this time. Breath didn't catch. The twelve inches are precedent. The quiet is enough.

[Day 3 — 22:40] Ch3: Second balm application, night. Autumn said 'more fortune than regret.' Justice drew. Tifa's voice broke. Said 'I don't deserve that.' C1 moved to CRITICAL. C2 at maximum load. The Asymmetry is producing active damage through grace. Door left open.

Ch3 CLOSE: 'The Infrastructure.' Autumn built a potion lab in Tifa's basement. Met Aerith — partnership formed. C3 breached in the church (Aerith's hands, 'I don't know if I'm okay'). First batch: six potions, luminous blue. White balm applied. 'Like it's working.' 'Not the cut.' 'More fortune than regret.' Justice drew — Tifa said 'I don't deserve that.' C1 moved CRITICAL. Three-day timeskip: 24 potions sold. Supply chain operational. Scar almost gone. The infrastructure holds.

[Day 6 — 07:20] Ch4 opens. Final balm application — scar almost gone. Autumn asked about 'the other thing' for the third time. Tifa gave the shape of the secret: 'a debt with no number owed to someone who doesn't know.' Border held. Closest to confession yet.

[Day 6 — 07:25] Ch4: Final balm application. Scar almost gone. Autumn asked about 'the other thing' third time. Tifa gave the shape: 'debt with no number owed to someone who doesn't know.' Autumn deduced he's the center. Said 'I see.' Announced relocation to Sector 5 — 'creature of comforts.' The World drew. Tifa asked 'when?' Then matched his humor: 'Aerith's terrible at real estate.' Departure collision simmering.

[Day 6 — 07:30] Ch4: Silence after the departure announcement. Autumn couldn't find the sentence. Tifa set down the smile, left without speaking, carried cold coffee upstairs. The mornings are almost over.

[Day 6 — 07:45] Ch4: Autumn left Seventh Heaven without seeing Tifa. No note. Bought breakfast at a stall. Walked to Sector 5 alone. The World drew twice. The cycle closing — six days of mornings ending in an empty chair.

[Day 6 — 08:15] Ch4: Autumn at Sector 5 church. Told Aerith the truth — 'that stubborn girl thinks I'm clueless, stupid enough to hurt herself for it.' Named the dynamic. Drew the line. Aerith warned: 'distance doesn't fix it, she carries it alone.' Autumn accepted. Mrs. Folia's unit confirmed. Aerith offered to plant flowers in the dead window box. The church held them both.

[Day 6 — 08:40] Ch4: Autumn asked Aerith 'do you have a boyfriend?' She answered honestly — 'I had someone. He left.' Named the Zack parallel. Autumn napping on her blanket. The church holds two people and two absences.

[Day 6 — 08:40] Ch4: Autumn asked Aerith 'do you have a boyfriend?' She answered honestly — 'I had someone. He left.' Named the Zack parallel. Autumn napping on her blanket. The church holds two people and two absences.

[Day 6 — 08:45] Ch4: Autumn said 'I'm sorry, Aerith.' She said 'he'd like you — same way of making places yours.' Named the Zack parallel as gift. Autumn slept on her pew. The church held two people and two absences.

[Day 6 — 17:30] Ch4: Church dinner at dusk. Cloud arrived at 4pm, waited three hours. Handed Autumn annotated shopping list — every ingredient mapped to his patrol routes. 'I'll think about it' delivered as callback joke. Invited Autumn on Sector 4 run Wednesday. Pattern Question resolving. Aerith cooked for three and held both confidences.

[Day 6 — 18:15] Cloud briefed Autumn on Sector 4 run. Three zones, three species. Partnership defined: list yours, routes mine, share the yield. Pattern Question resolved — Cloud chose include. Avalanche ops framed as perimeter patrol. Asymmetry deepens.

[Day 6 — 19:30] Ch4: The Asymmetry fires. Autumn returned to pack. Tifa's C1 breached — regression, stillness, hands stopped. She said: 'You're the only thing that's been making it better' and 'I can't tell you why, but you're wrong about the shape.' The High Priestess drew — hidden knowledge surfacing through intuition. The wall fell in front of regulars who didn't notice. The doorknob is warm.

[Day 6 — 22:40] Ch4 climax: The Asymmetry resolves. Tifa's C1 breached in front of the bar — 'you're the only thing making it better.' Autumn waited for close. Storage room. She described the architecture: guilt is foundation, something else grew inside. Both real. Can't prove the clean part clean. Autumn asked 'what am I to you.' She couldn't categorize — described him through mornings instead. Found the third confession: 'I don't know where I go.' The caretaker has no place. Hand open on the chair arm.

Ch4: The Asymmetry resolves into acknowledged-undefined. Tifa confessed guilt and something-else. Autumn asked 'what am I to you.' She couldn't categorize. He offered his hand. She took it. 'I go here.' First non-medical touch. The caretaker found a place.

Ch4 CLOSE 'The Folder Won't Close': Autumn returned to pack. Tifa's C1 breached — 'you're the only thing making it better.' Waited for close. Storage room confession: guilt is foundation, something else grew inside. 'I don't know where I go.' Hand offered, hand taken. 'I go here.' Pulled in. Slept on the cot. Shirt gripped. Asymmetry resolved into acknowledged-undefined — information gap dormant, physical intimacy established. The folder closed not with information but with contact.

Ch5 Wednesday morning: Autumn chuckled and teased — 'whatever should I do with you now.' Tifa blushed for the first time in six days. Hid in his chest. Said 'shut up' muffled by his shirt. Pushed without pushing. Laughed the real laugh. Said 'you're the worst' with one eye visible from the cheek-on-chest position. The morning face has no template for being teased. The morning face is learning. Marlene's bed creaked a third time — louder.

[Day 7 — 06:48] First kiss. Autumn leaned in — 'I can be worse.' Tifa froze, breath caught, pupil dilated. Her hand found his jaw, trembling. Kissed back slow — discovery pace, unpracticed. Two sounds, the second smaller. Marlene's feet hit the floor above. The window is closing.

[Day 7 — 06:49] Ch5 morning: Second kiss — she kissed back harder, hand on his neck mirroring his hand on her head. He cancelled the Sector 5 rent mid-kiss. 'You're staying' — not a question. Forehead to forehead, wet eyes. Marlene called from upstairs. Tifa left with a bookmark kiss, messy hair, open door. 'I'll find you a room.' The departure is dead. The boyfriend is home.

Ch5 morning domestic: Autumn climbed to the kitchen, brewed cheap coffee, cracked four eggs. The bar reads differently when you're not a guest. Marlene descended first — stopped, assessed, said 'you're making eggs' with four-year-old authority. Tifa followed, hair still messy, shirt still wrinkled from his chest. Didn't fix either. The not-fixing is the morning's bravest act. Morning Architecture collision active — the child is witnessing the building's new shape.

[Day 7 — 07:15] Ch5: First breakfast as three. Autumn made eggs, toast, bad coffee. Marlene audited — 'you put salt on them, Tifa doesn't' — then carried her own plate to the sink. The plate-carrying is the verdict. Tifa drank terrible coffee without complaint and let the morning be seen. Meanwhile: Shinra data clerk runs weekly transit audit, Autumn's temp card flagged for cross-sector pattern. Cloud checks his blade in Sector 5.

[Day 7 — 07:20] Autumn asked Tifa to visit Aerith. Half-second pause — not reluctance, calculation. Aerith will read the night in three seconds. 'I should check on the supply.' Then quieter: 'She's going to be insufferable.' The want underneath the logistics. The coffee hiding the blush.

[Day 7 — 07:35] Ch5: Walk to Sector 5. First public outing — Tifa beside him, hair still messy, shoulder-distance. Sector 5 checkpoint upgraded: second guard, mounted scanner, new hardware this week. Tifa clocked it before Autumn. 'That's new.' Morning voice gone, operational voice arrived. Supply chain collision now ACTIVE at distance zero.

[Day 7 — 07:37] Autumn took Tifa's hand walking toward Sector 5 checkpoint. New scanner, second guard. Her grip shifted — morning warmth to operational tension, readable only through the tendon in her wrist. Perfect gait, perfect shape. The performance invisible to guards, visible to skin contact. Supply chain collision at distance zero.

[Day 7 — 07:40] Checkpoint passage. Autumn's temp card scanned — seventh crossing in ten days. Second guard clocked their hands, filed them as couple. Tifa's operational tendon eased one degree on the other side. Neither mentioned the scanner. The data accrues. The morning continues.

[Day 7 — 07:52] Ch5: Church arrival. Autumn presented Tifa — 'look who I caught.' Aerith's smile went nuclear. Started quoting Tifa's Day 3 garden confession ('didn't know what she—') before Tifa shut it down with her name like a door. Aerith raised her hands in fake surrender, eyes full of everything she won't say. The warmth underneath the teasing was real — she held those hands three days ago. 'About time you checked on your flowers.' All three know the flowers aren't the point.

[Day 7 — 07:52] Ch5: Church arrival. Autumn presented Tifa — 'look who I caught.' Aerith's smile went nuclear. Started quoting Tifa's Day 3 garden confession ('didn't know what she—') before Tifa shut it down with her name like a door. Aerith raised her hands in fake surrender, eyes full of everything she won't say. The warmth underneath the teasing was real — she held those hands three days ago. 'About time you checked on your flowers.' All three know the flowers aren't the point.

[Day 7 — 07:54] Ch5: Autumn proposed keeping church room as secondary lab and resource storage. Aerith agreed — 'back room's yours anyway, but flowers stay where they are.' Tifa quiet beside him, thumb on his knuckle. The departure is dead but the infrastructure lives. Two sectors, one system, her hand in his.

[Day 7 — 08:05] Ch5: Cloud left word at church — 06:00 arrival, Autumn absent, run rescheduled to 18:00 tonight. Sector 4 east perimeter. Aerith delivered the message with a micro-glance between Autumn and Tifa that said: three separate drawers. Tifa's hands found the doorframe. Said nothing. The information gap — dormant since 'I go here' — woke up in the shape of patrol routes.

[Day 7 — 08:00-12:00] Ch5: Morning montage at church lab. Autumn prepped standard batch ingredients — moonbloom, binding salts, catalytic resin. Two crates packed for Seventh Heaven transport. Tifa packed crates without being asked, bartender hands nesting bottles. Aerith cycled garden-to-lab with thistle questions and cold storage logistics. Working silence. Shinra weekly transit audit moved from processing to compiled — analyst desk by EOB Wednesday.

[Day 7 — 12:15] Ch5: Lunch at the Sector 5 noodle stall — same one from Day 3. Three bowls, extra for everyone. Aerith reverse-engineered supply chain from demand over noodles. Tifa's shoulder three inches from Autumn's. Aerith put a noodle on Tifa's nose. Both women laughed — the real laugh, the lunch laugh. The afternoon waits: crates, checkpoint, Cloud's run.

[Day 7 — 12:20] Ch5: Autumn invited Tifa on Cloud's Sector 4 monster run. She glanced at Aerith first — the micro-exchange about routes neither can explain. Hand flat on counter, then 'yeah' with lightness on top of weight. 'Could use the exercise.' The information gap goes operational tonight. Three on the route: two who know, one who doesn't.

[Day 7 — 12:30-17:55] Ch5: Afternoon montage. Crates through checkpoint (eighth crossing logged). Lab prep at Seventh Heaven. Tifa sat beside Autumn on the cot — no task, no reason. Shoulder contact. The afternoon's gift. Meanwhile: Floor 14, Shinra HQ. Analyst named Carver, alone at desk 3, pulled Autumn's temp card at 15:47. Seven crossings, no work permit, no prior residency. Flagged for enhanced monitoring — next crossing triggers photograph. One of forty flags. The Hermit found his truth in the pattern.

[Day 7 — 18:05] Ch5: Three-person formation into Sector 4. Cloud point, Tifa right flank, Autumn center. The geometry is escort, not hunting party. Cloud navigated without hesitating — muscle memory, every junction. Tifa anticipated the third turn without looking. Autumn noticed. She caught him noticing and redirected — morning eyes to operational eyes. Cloud's halt signal was military-standard, not mercenary. The corridor hums with mako cycling below. Something moves in the dark ahead.

[Day 7 — 18:15] Ch5: First combat. Sector 4 drake — twelve seconds, no words, no wasted motion. Cloud's speed inhuman; Tifa's Zangan mastery fully revealed. She knew the chitin gap. The coordination was automatic — history deeper than mercenary freelance. Autumn watched from the wall, counted seconds, filed everything. She checked on him first. He walked to the body with extraction tools. The parts are the job. The evidence is the yield.

[Day 7 — 18:35] Ch5: Route descended into Sector 4 maintenance corridors. Cloud opened hidden panel — cut seam, memorized touch point — revealing Avalanche staging cache: military surplus crates, reactor schematics with patrol timings, materia rack, explosive charges. Cloud packed a charge beside the drake parts without explanation. Tifa stood in the threshold, watching Autumn read the maps. The blue route line matched their exact path. Twelve seconds of combat sync, military hand signals, shared navigation — all reclassified as Avalanche reconnaissance patrol. Six feet between them. The longest distance all day.

[Day 7 — 18:40] Ch5: Wednesday Run resolves COSTLY. The Magician drew. Autumn read Avalanche maps and kept walking — the non-reaction was the response. Cloud passed Tifa in the threshold without looking. She crossed both feet into the corridor. Matched his stride. Four inches apart — closer than operational, not touching. No explanation, no apology. The information gap closed through continuation. Complicity collision spawned: Autumn's knowledge + Shinra's flagged transit card + irreversible exposure.

[Day 7 — 18:42] Ch5: Autumn took Tifa's hand — completing her reach — and whispered 'Ms. Lockhart, tonight you need to be prepared.' The formality hit her ribcage. The words hit her hand (one-degree tightening). The redirect rose and found no wall (C3 breached). She said 'For what?' — two words, not deflection, genuine. Cloud fifteen feet ahead, not turning. The corridor smells like mako and consequence.

[Day 7 — 18:43] Ch5: Autumn answered 'For what?' with 'For my brutal torture and interrogation.' Deadpan. Tifa made a sound that wasn't a laugh — the ghost of one. Shoulders dropped two inches. Fingers interlocked. She said 'You don't have the attention span.' The almost-laugh voice. Cloud's stride hitched one quarter-beat on 'torture' — filed, resumed. The joke was the kindest thing anyone did for her tonight: it said I saw your war and my hand didn't move. Release beat after heavy revelation sequence.

[Day 7 — 18:50] Ch5: The Tower. Emerged from Avalanche corridors into Seventh Heaven back hall. Barret at debrief table — one glass, dry condensation ring, an hour of waiting. Quiet voice: 'sit down.' Not the Barret who throws chairs. The Barret who did the math. Cloud took the wall. Tifa's hand tightened three degrees and didn't let go. Barret's eyes settled on Autumn — the civilian who walked his routes and holds his most trusted person's hand. Wednesday Run resolved EVOLUTION.

[Day 7 — 18:52] Ch5: The Reckoning. Barret asked what Autumn would do. Autumn gestured at Tifa — 'Mine is upstairs too. I'll join.' Two sentences. Barret went blank for two seconds, framework crashed. Tifa's fingers curled on the table, eyes down, buying time — claimed in front of her commander. Cloud shifted full weight. Barret's answer: not yes, not no. Gun-arm pointed at ceiling, at Marlene's footsteps. 'You put her at risk, we're done. Not Tifa — Marlene.' The conditional.

[Day 7 — 18:54] Ch5: The Reckoning resolved. Autumn said 'Clear. I'll ensure Seventh Heaven and Marlene isn't compromised from me.' Then: 'I'll join.' Barret stood, said 'Aight' — not trust, recognition. Assigned Wednesday 0600 topside. Went upstairs to Marlene. Cloud nodded minimally, left for front of bar. Tifa remained at the table, hands flat, eyes down, then looked up: 'You meant that.' Not a question.

[Day 7 — 18:56] Ch5: Aftermath of The Reckoning. Autumn confirmed — last night was his last chance to leave, he chose to stay. 'Checkmate.' Tifa laughed — real, short, broken at the edges. Hand crossed the table, covered his. 'You're an idiot.' Thumb across his knuckle. The new vocabulary. Marlene's footsteps settled above. Wednesday 0600 approaching.

[Day 7 — 18:58] Ch5: Autumn asked about a better room (callback humor) and kissed Tifa lightly at the table. She went still for one second, pressed her hand down on his, eyes closed. Opened them from three inches — the cot distance. 'You're sleeping in the storage room. Same as last night. Cot's fine. I checked.' Thumb across his knuckle. 'You can complain about it after Wednesday.' The first kiss at the table where Barret's condensation ring still shows.

[Day 7 — 19:02] Ch5: Autumn said 'only if you are joining me' over his shoulder and walked to the washroom. Tifa tried for the redirect — route maps, operational pivot — and it didn't come. 'I'll think about it,' she said to his back. The yes that can't say yes yet. Shinra patrol crawled through Sector 7 outside — enhanced logging, unhurried, the plate reminding the slums it's there. Tifa's spine straightened at the sound. Her hand didn't move from where his had been.

[Day 7 — 19:15] Ch5: Autumn washed up (lukewarm water, cracked mirror, bruise darkening) and settled into the storage room cot. Fresh blue potion bottle on the crate — angled for the pillow, replaced by Tifa. Hospital corners on the blanket. The room is evidence of a woman who came in during the day and prepared it with care she'd never name. Barret's lullaby vibrates through the floor joists. Tifa arrives at the door with route maps — the briefing Barret ordered, the excuse she needed. 'Route maps. Barret said to brief you.' The pause after says the maps are the excuse.

[Day 7 — 19:18] Ch5: Tifa entered the storage room with route maps — the operational excuse holding barely. Autumn didn't sit up. She spread Jessie's hand-drawn maps on the crate, briefed checkpoints (three, third rotates), Cloud on point, Barret covering exit, Tifa at relay junction Sector 6 border. Her hair fell six inches from his chest. The briefing was real. The room was also real. Both coexisted in eight by six feet of storage space.

[Day 7 — 19:22] Ch5: Briefing ended — Autumn absorbed the route without questions. Tifa rolled the maps slowly, set them on the crate next to the potion bottle she'd replaced. Gloves off. Hands gripping the crate edge. She said 'You should sleep. 0600 comes fast.' She didn't leave. The not-leaving was the answer to 'only if you are joining me' — not spoken, just present, standing three feet from the cot with nowhere to put her hands.

[Day 7 — 19:24] Ch5: Autumn stood from the cot and embraced Tifa. She went still — three, four seconds of the body deciding whether the arms around her were threat or shelter. Then the exhale: shoulders dropping further than they've dropped in years. Hands rose slowly to his back, fingers spreading against his shoulder blades with the care of someone touching something they don't believe they're allowed to have. Forehead against his sternum. No words. The silence was relief, not redirect. Blue potion-light. Maps on the crate. Cloud thirty feet and an entire continent away.

[Day 7 — 19:26] Ch5: Autumn broke the tender silence with an apology about the mirror scene in front of Barret — 'sorry I couldn't stop myself.' Tifa laughed into his shirt, hit his back with four ounces of force from a hand that breaks concrete. 'You're not sorry.' She pulled back two inches, face finding a new shape: amusement, clean and unlayered. Started quoting Barret's inevitable speech — 'that man looking at you like—' and stopped, catching the implication. Couldn't finish. Hand returned to his back. 'You should still sleep.' Hand didn't move.

[Day 7 — 19:28] Ch5: Autumn kissed Tifa slowly in the storage room — 'I want to make good the claim, the my girl part.' Not the brief table kiss — slow, deliberate, private. Her hands gripped his back. A small pre-verbal sound into his mouth. She leaned in — the lean she didn't give at the table. His fingers found her hair near the pink band. When it ended at three inches she said 'okay' in a voice reduced to one syllable. Forehead returned to his sternum. The claim made good.

[Day 7 — 19:32] Ch5: Autumn's hands slipped under Tifa's shirt to the small of her back. Goosebumps under his fingers. Her spine curved toward his palms. She buried her face in his chest, gathered his shirt in her fists, made a sound smaller than the pre-verbal one. Turned her cheek against his sternum — choosing partial visibility. Said his name into his chest. Small circles on her skin. The gentleness harder to process than the fierce because the gentle has no template.

[Day 7 — 19:35] Ch5: Autumn stopped — pulled his hands from her skin and held her tight instead. The de-escalation louder than the escalation. Tifa's body surprised — the grammar she knew had rules and he broke them by choosing holding over taking. Fists tightened in his shirt, pulled him closer. Full face burial in his chest. Said 'thanks' — muffled, one word, the insufficient word that carried everything. The stopping was the claim.

[Day 7 — 19:38] Ch5: Autumn kissed Tifa again and guided her to the cot. She followed — the woman who leads everything, followed. The cot caught them both. Her palms flat on his chest, hair falling around them in blue light. She said 'you stopped' — not accusation, not question, a naming. Her thumb traced collarbone to shoulder to neck, mapping safe territory. The stopping gave her the choosing. She's choosing.

[Day 7 — 19:40] Ch5: Autumn read Tifa's physical inexperience without naming it — 'I sense you need a bit more time.' She laughed the caught laugh. Tried to deny, stopped. Said 'I just haven't' — three words carrying twenty-two years. Hand returned to his chest, over his heart. The one surface she knows. Almost-smile from new materials: not shame, just truth.

[Day 7 — 19:45] Ch5: Autumn said 'sure' and pulled Tifa gently to the cot. She came down in stages — hip, ribs, shoulder, cheek to sternum. Hand stayed over his heart. Shinra patrol passed again, slower — enhanced protocols. She heard it, started to tense; his arm tightened one degree and she stayed soft. The woman who always straightens let someone else hold the perimeter. Breathing slowed to the sleeping rhythm. Blue light fading. Wednesday 10 hours away.

Ch5 'Wednesday': The longest day. First kiss ('I can be worse'), breakfast as three (Marlene's plate to the sink), Sector 5 checkpoint hand-in-hand (new scanner, second guard). Church lab work. Sector 4 run revealed Avalanche: staging cache, reactor schematics, explosive charges. Autumn read the maps and kept walking. Barret's reckoning — 'Mine is upstairs too. I'll join.' Conditional acceptance: Marlene non-negotiable. Storage room: kisses, hands under shirt, the stopping. 'I just haven't.' 'Sure.' Sleeping rhythm on the cot. Wednesday 0600 approaching.

[Day 8 — 05:17] Ch6 opens. Autumn wakes alone — Tifa left Cure materia and water on the crate, blanket tucked. Barret knocks at 0522, one word: 'Downstairs.' Basement via pinball machine. Gear room: filed-serial swords, Tifa's spare gloves, Jessie's explosive bench (MK3 — 20m reliable, 25m theoretical), half-empty materia rack where gaps are the dead. A worn collapsible staff belonging to someone not here anymore. Barret asks 'What are you.' The selection is the test.

[Day 8 — 05:28] Basement gear room. Autumn selects Shinra infantry sword (back holster), Fire materia, Cure already pocketed from Tifa's crate. Barret watches the sword come off the wall — the handling too fluid for a civilian alchemist. Gun-arm recalibrates involuntarily. 'Thought you was support.' Then the door question: 'You ever killed someone.' Seven gaps in the materia rack behind him.

[Day 8 — 05:30] Autumn answers Barret's kill question with 'I've had training. I can take care of myself.' Barret reads the non-answer as no confirmed kills. Four seconds of silence, then operational adjustment: Autumn assigned to tunnel team with Barret (close supervision), sword as last resort only. Cloud takes main gate distraction. Op is procurement — Sector 4 Shinra supply depot, medical/materia/weapon stockpile. Not demolition. Barret's parting line: 'Don't make me carry you home.'

world:_:constants.voice.to: Grounded, close-third, sensory. Short sentences under pressure. Longer when scene breathes. Physical details earn emotional weight. Dialogue clipped and real.

world:_:constants.tone.to: Consequences real and lingering. Strangers guarded but human. Trust 2-4 scenes to earn. Winning complicated but satisfying. Help reluctant or transactional. Baseline tense but alive.

world:_:constants.tone_rules.to: 1. Weight earns release — never sustain grimness more than two beats. 2. Inhabited not analyzed — interiority through gestures. 3. Hope is concrete — show the stubborn small thing.

world:_:constants.motivation.to: Survive the immediate crisis. Discover what draws Autumn into Midgar's war.

world:_:constants.objective.to: Get through this encounter with the unknown woman and reach safety

pc:_:reputation.Shinra.to: Unknown. No file. Civilian near Reactor 1 blast — potential suspect if identified. Checkpoints tightening. Sector 5 trip increases exposure.

pc:_:reputation.Avalanche.to: Not a threat. A problem becoming an asset. Barret stood down. Cloud's file won't close. Jessie filed contradiction. Sixth mug as silent vote.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: He makes everything sound like a business plan. Gave him key, workspace, ingredients on her tab. 'Good bones, Tifa' — the compliment that bypassed the redirect. Investor. Unbearable. Has a room now. Not leaving.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: He does this. Proposed business with Aerith. Went to the back garden. Said 'that's a good story' and stopped talking. Quoting him now. His spine straightened. His hands knew. Six bottles glowing blue. Said his name. Didn't have a word.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: He does this. Proposed business with Aerith. Went to the back garden. Said 'that's a good story' and stopped talking. Quoting him now. His spine straightened. His hands knew. Six bottles glowing blue. Said his name. Didn't have a word.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: He does this. Proposed business with Aerith. Said 'that's a good story.' Six bottles glowing blue. Said his name. 'I'm glad you're here.' Balm on her face. 'Most people won't notice.' 'Not the cut.' Cracked his spine and said 'your problem now' meaning 'I'm not going anywhere.' Caught my hand moving. The almost-laugh was real.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: Fortune. He called me fortune. More fortune than regret. The man with nothing. The man who rounds up. The man who doesn't probe. The door is open. I don't deserve that. I don't.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: Fortune. He called me fortune. More fortune than regret. The man with nothing. The man who rounds up. The man who doesn't probe. The door is open. I don't deserve that. I don't.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: Fortune. The morning. The chair. The gold fingers. The almost-laugh. Three days of ritual. The scar almost gone under his hands. I don't deserve this and I can't stop sitting in the chair.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: Fortune. The morning. The chair. The gold fingers. The almost-laugh. Three days of ritual. The scar almost gone under his hands. I don't deserve this and I can't stop sitting in the chair.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: He heard me. He's leaving. He's leaving because he heard me. The logistics make sense. The logistics are a lie. He's doing this for me and I can't say stay without explaining why and I can't explain why.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: He heard me. He's leaving. He's leaving because he heard me. The logistics make sense. The logistics are a lie. He's doing this for me and I can't say stay without explaining why and I can't explain why.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: He heard me. He's leaving because he heard me. The logistics are kindness. The potions continue. The mornings don't. He almost laughed at my joke about plumbing. The almost-laugh is the last real thing.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: He heard me. He's leaving because he heard me. The logistics are kindness. The potions continue. The mornings don't. He almost laughed at my joke about plumbing. The almost-laugh is the last real thing.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: He kept quiet. He saw the smile and didn't fix it and didn't challenge it and didn't fill it. The quiet was worse than the departure. The quiet meant he meant it.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: He kept quiet. He saw the smile and didn't fix it and didn't challenge it and didn't fill it. The quiet was worse than the departure. The quiet meant he meant it.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: He stayed. He heard the shape and didn't need the content. He offered his hand. He said 'silly girl' and pulled her in and held her while she slept. The shirt grip is the body's review.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: He stayed. He heard the shape and didn't need the content. He offered his hand. He said 'silly girl' and pulled her in and held her while she slept. The shirt grip is the body's review.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: Boyfriend. Staying. Cancelled the rent mid-kiss. Needs a proper room. The creature of comforts is home.

pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.from: Boyfriend. Staying. Cancelled the rent mid-kiss. Needs a proper room. The creature of comforts is home.
pc:_:reputation.Tifa Lockhart.to: Claimed her in front of Barret. Confessed the staying was a choice made on the cot. She called him an idiot. Hand on hand.

constraint:c1-steady:current_pressure.to: 'Good bones, Tifa' softened C1 instead of straining it — arms uncrossed involuntarily, voice dropped to soft register. Being credited for workspace relaxed C1 instead of testing it. But relaxation is its own pressure — C1 supposed to hold, not ease. The steady one doesn't soften in doorways. The softening was visible.

constraint:c1-steady:current_pressure.to: Aerith revealed something private about Tifa's patterns — 'you never bring anyone' — in front of the person breaking the pattern. C1 holding but the steadiness has no furniture to lean on.

constraint:c1-steady:current_pressure.from: Aerith revealed something private about Tifa's patterns — 'you never bring anyone' — in front of the person breaking the pattern. C1 holding but the steadiness has no furniture to lean on.

constraint:c1-steady:current_pressure.r: C1 secondary pressure from C3 breach

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.autumn.to: He said 'boyfriend' at Marle's door and I over-corrected and he saw. He introduced himself before I could — 'Autumn. I'm new.' He ordered white balm ingredients same breath as potions. Said 'good bones, Tifa' and my arms uncrossed and I said 'I'm glad it works' in the soft voice. He said 'first batch tonight' and meant my face is on a clock. He makes everything sound like a business plan. I said three sentences about her. Three. He didn't even ask.

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.cloud.to: Loaned Autumn the boots. Watched the room-key exchange. The file I can't see got thicker. Haven't spoken to him since yesterday evening.

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.marle.to: She saw. She looked at the ingredients and my eyebrow and said 'I can see that' and wrapped the jars slowly and put it on my tab and didn't ask. She gave me room. The way he gives me room.

char:tifa-lockhart:reads.barret.to: Gone since yesterday morning. The father won the argument. Left me with the stranger and the trust.

collision:sector5-trip:status.r: Active now — they're in the playground, costs real
They're here. Aerith is real. Introduction happening.

collision:sector5-trip:distance.r: Arrived at church. Contact present. Introduction imminent.

collision:asymmetry:distance.r: Loop ambulatory — supply run through three sectors
Aerith saw the loop. One more witness who understands the shape. The asymmetry deepens — Autumn still doesn't know WHY Tifa has the wound.
The asymmetry is no longer approaching. It's here. She can feel it. She can't name it. He can't see it. Distance zero — the collision is the silence between what she knows and what he doesn't.

divination:_:last_draw.r: Card drawn for balm scene resolution

collision:permanence:distance.r: Business partnership = permanence with a contract
Three-person lunch, supply chain sealed, unit expanding. Permanence is no longer approaching — it has arrived.

Offered her bottles as vials. Made the church into a supply depot. Going to lunch.

pc:_:reputation.tifa.to: He made the balm first. Before the potions. Put it on the highest shelf because humidity degrades calendula. His fingers traced the cut and the pressure was measured in grams. He said most people won't notice. Twelve inches. I closed my eyes. Like it's working.

pc:_:reputation.tifa.from: He made the balm first. Before the potions. Put it on the highest shelf because humidity degrades calendula. His fingers traced the cut and the pressure was measured in grams. He said most people won't notice. Twelve inches. I closed my eyes. Like it's working.

constraint:aerith-c2-last:current_pressu.to: Autumn asked 'tell me about you.' She told the surface story — Elmyra, the church, selling flowers. Four gaps: 'my mom Elmyra' (second mother implied), 'waiting for someone' (specific, not general), flowers growing in clean soil (unexplained), reading people through something that isn't observation (unexplained). All four doors walked past smoothly. The Last held. But Autumn filed every gap.

char:tifa-lockhart:intimacy_stance.to: Physical vocabulary established: kissing, embrace, skin contact (his hands on her back), sleeping together on the cot. She followed him down. She said 'I just haven't' — inexperience named without shame. The stopping gave her the choosing. Currently: building trust through repetition. The grammar is hers but the vocabulary is new. Next threshold: her initiating, or allowing escalation she didn't plan. Not ready for sex — hasn't been close enough to know where that boundary lives. The readiness will come from accumulated safety, not a single moment.

collision:complicity:status.r: Autumn joined Avalanche, costs now live

collision:transit-pattern:distance.r: Eighth crossing logged, ninth = photo trigger

faction:shinra:momentum.to: Data accumulation — transit audit processing forty flags. Enhanced checkpoint hardware across sectors. Patrol circuits logging pedestrian activity.

faction:avalanche:momentum.to: Wednesday 0600 topside op. First joint operation with full roster including Autumn. Gear selection and briefing pending.

collision:first-blood:distance.r: gear selected, Barret's kill question is the last gate before movement
